summary: Good soundboard capture of an underrated second set with a minimalist Dark Star that disappoints and an intriguing MLB jam.
review: The recording is praised as a solid upgrade over earlier SBD releases, delivering clear board sound. Musically the second set is considered underrated overall, though the opening Dark Star is described as noisy and unmelodic while the unexpected jump into an MLB jam adds intrigue. Opinions are mixed, with two 4‑star fans liking the show and one 3‑star reviewer disappointed by Dark Star.

ai_rating.rationale: Two positive 4‑star reviews highlight a good soundboard source and an underrated second set; one 3‑star review criticizes Dark Star, yielding an overall strong but not flawless impression.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers note this release is a welcome upgrade over previous SBD master reel/DAT/CD‑R versions and report no audible flaws.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set opens with a very minimalist Dark Star that many found disappointing, then abruptly shifts into an MLB jam; overall the set is viewed as underrated and enjoyable despite the shaky start.
